creator: lbolmerg@web.de
text:
the dkim-milter startup script does not reflect the settings of the following variables set in /etc/rc.conf

milterdkim_domain, milterdkim_key, milterdkim_selector, milterdkim_alg

Setting these variables has no effect

Fix: here is a suggestion for a patch
How-To-Repeat: set variables in /etc/rc.conf and start dkim-milter using /usr/local/etc/rc.d/milterdkim
